name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the shortening, peanut butter, and sugars.
2. Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
3. Stir in the flour and mix well until combined.
4. Pat the dough into a greased 15-by-10 1/2 inch baking sheet.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Remove from the oven and sprinkle generously with chocolate chips and marshmallows (in that order) until well covered to your liking.
7. Return to the oven and cook until the marshmallows are lightly browned, or to the desired darkness. If you prefer, you may turn the oven up to broil for the last part only; however, do not place the pizza too close to the broiler like you would meat, and keep a close eye on it since it will finish quickly!
